name: Update Sign
desc: Player finishes editing a sign. Sends the block position and four lines of text as IChatComponents.

fields.name: lines
fields.desc: 4 lines of sign text as JSON ChatComponents

notes: Jigsaw 0.26 OPSign module cancels and resends C12 twice to crash the server's sign data structure on vanilla 1.8-1.8.5 servers (exploit patched in 1.8.8+).

modules.name: SignEditor
modules.purpose: Send sign text to server after editing.

modules.name: ColorSigns
modules.purpose: Send sign text to server after editing.
